data.name: Async Pro v1.0
data.description: High-quality TTS model for the most natural-sounding speech. Fast streaming with accurate handling of dates, numbers, currencies, and abbreviations.

data.name: Async Flash v1.5
data.description: A latency-optimized streaming TTS model with strong built-in handling of non-standard text such as dates, currencies, numbers, and abbreviations.

data.name: Async Flash v1.0
data.description: Legacy model with the broadest language support. Use this for languages not yet supported by Flash v1.5.
